title: Notifications
description: Choose which notifications you want to receive by email. Most default to instant; system alerts are bundled into a daily digest.

mention.label: Mentions
mention.description: When you are mentioned in a note or comment

comment_reply.label: Comment replies
comment_reply.description: When someone replies to your comment

share_invite.label: Share invites
share_invite.description: When someone shares a note with you

research_complete.label: Research complete
research_complete.description: When a deep research run you started is ready

profile.heading: Email body settings
profile.description: Set the language used in email bodies and the timezone the daily digest fires in.
